_help: One structured home for every competitive / novelty / security / market claim. The baseline gate validates each entry. Required per claim: statement, type, build_state, blast_radius; existential claims also need de_risk_milestone; novelty/competitive/market claims also need prior_art_checked (a date) + how_we_differ. type ∈ technical|novelty|competitive|market|empirical|security. build_state ∈ shipped-tested|designed-unshipped|assumed-unmeasured. blast_radius ∈ existential|recoverable.

claims.statement: No productized cross-CAD migration tool or paid migration service exists — the migration lane is empty
claims.de_risk_milestone: Confirm the empty lane via a competitor-changelog sweep + 5 customer interviews before committing M3 GTM
claims.how_we_differ: Existing tools resolve/overwrite silently or export laws-only; we ship a visual schema-mapping wizard + paid concierge

citations.supports_because: Nearest adjacent tech resolves contradictions but offers no schema-mapping migration path

claims.statement: No FiveM CAD ships AI report-gen + auto-evidence + case-timeline (ImperialCAD markets it as roadmap only)
claims.how_we_differ: Competitors ship AI dispatch (table-stakes); none touch the officer report workflow — compete on depth, not concept

claims.statement: Multi-tenant isolation is fail-closed and leak-free through a transaction-mode pooler (SI-2)
claims.de_risk_milestone: Enforced by tenant-isolation.pooler integration test (pool_size=1, DISCARD off, both roles) in CI
